rules.statement: Delivery MUST be at-least-once with idempotent handling.
Every command/event message MUST include authority and policy context metadata.
`auditor` observer mode MUST be read-only across all channels.
Messages in untrusted channels MUST fail closed for privileged actions.
Messages exceeding retry limits MUST be dead-lettered with immutable audit metadata.
Every ACP frame MUST include route and auth context before dispatch.
Ack timeout or retryable nack MUST trigger bounded retry policy.
Retry exhaustion MUST transition frame to dead-letter state with immutable diagnostics.
Non-retryable nack MUST fail fast and produce audit event.
ACP payload MUST encapsulate valid A2A envelope schema.
Governance-critical actions MUST emit immutable audit events.
Audit events MUST include policy metadata (`policy_version`, `policy_hash`, `rule_ids`) for governed actions.
Agent pause events MUST generate audit records including ceo notification and owner alert status when critical impact is true.
Every action request MUST include actor id and role.
Actions outside authority matrix MUST be denied.
System-level workforce lifecycle actions MUST be executed by cwo in normal operations; owner may authorize exceptions through constitutional override workflow.
secretary role MUST remain advisory-only and MAY access relevant dashboard, alert, and owner chat data in read-only mode for onboarding and status interpretation.
secretary role MAY request executive or specialist participation for out-of-scope questions but MUST NOT delegate as command authority.
Execution at or above hard threshold MUST be blocked or paused.
Concurrent spending MUST use atomic reservation.
Threshold values MUST be sourced from active YAML budget policy.
Hard-breach events MUST trigger governance escalation metadata for `auditor`/`owner`/`ceo` flow.
Budget decisions MUST include policy version/hash context.
Policy evaluation MUST use an explicit constitution version.
Only YAML policy artifacts are accepted in v1.
Global active policy version MUST be singular and atomically switchable.
Invalid policy bundle activation MUST fail-closed.
Constitutional assets MUST be versioned and auditable.
Only the owner can approve policy changes in v1.
Runtime policy source MUST be YAML-only in v1.
Runtime policy mode MUST use a single globally active policy version.
Unknown runtime roles MUST be denied by default.
UNSPECIFIED_RULE_STATEMENT
Error responses MUST include canonical code, actionable reason, and deterministic handling metadata.
Critical incidents MUST follow defined escalation path.
Governance and infrastructure escalations MUST permit direct owner escalation.
Budget hard-threshold enforcement MUST be initiated by auditor independent of operational chain.
Escalation records MUST include incident class, current stage, and next authority target.
Any agent pause action MUST be reported to ceo.
Agent pause actions with critical impact MUST alert owner immediately.
Safety-critical failures MUST trigger containment before retry.
Recovery behavior MUST be deterministic for same failure class + policy version.
Zero-context restart MUST require validated restart artifact set.
Safety-critical recovery resume MUST require explicit clearance evidence.
Recovery and restart actions MUST emit immutable audit events.
New projects MUST pass cso strategic review before ceo approval.
Proposals marked `Needs Revision` MUST NOT proceed without resubmission.
`Strategic Conflict` proposals rejected three times MUST require explicit ceo override to proceed.
ceo final decision outcomes MUST be audit logged with rationale.
Normative terms MUST map to one canonical definition.
Executive and operational agents MUST NOT override governance enforcement actions.
Every runtime action MUST be attributable to an authenticated principal.
Critical actions MUST emit structured logs with trace_id.
Full profile logging MUST be used for deny, allow_with_obligations, and governance/emergency actions.
Structured log records MUST preserve policy metadata (`policy_version`, `policy_hash`, `rule_ids`) for governed actions.
Immutable execution logs MUST be append-only.
Memory tier transitions MUST follow configured TTL and lifecycle policies.
Cross-project memory isolation MUST be enforced for all reads and writes.
Deletion overrides outside normal retention flow MUST require `owner` approval.
Snapshot artifacts MUST be created before compression or archival compaction.
CDC application MUST be idempotent and ordered by source sequence.
CDC checkpoint recovery MUST be deterministic and auditable.
Critical incidents MUST trigger alerts to governance channels.
Every alert MUST resolve a source owner role before escalation.
Ambiguous-owner alerts MUST default-route to `ceo` with audit metadata.
Alert events MUST include required escalation metadata fields.
All policy decisions MUST emit telemetry events.
All lifecycle transitions MUST emit telemetry events.
All budget threshold crossings MUST emit telemetry events.
Critical incidents MUST page governance channels.
owner-issued commands MUST pass policy authorization before execution.
Critical owner interaction events MUST generate immutable audit records.
owner channel access MUST respect role and project scope constraints.
Alert severity mapping MUST follow constitutional safety/escalation policies.
Task MUST pass Policy Engine before dispatch.
Task MUST reserve budget before dispatch.
Policy or budget evaluation errors MUST fail closed and block dispatch.
Orchestrator MUST execute required obligations for `allow_with_obligations` decisions before dispatch.
Governance enforcement actions MUST NOT be overridden by orchestrator logic.
Task state transitions MUST emit traceable events with immutable audit references.
Duplicate requests with same idempotency key MUST be side-effect safe.
Decisions MUST be deterministic for same normalized input and policy version.
Deny response MUST include at least one rule ID.
Policy evaluation errors MUST result in deny decisions.
Unknown actor roles MUST be denied.
allow_with_obligations decisions MUST include explicit obligations.
Every decision MUST return policy version and hash metadata.
Policy evaluation MUST include execution-target and communication-context constraints when provided.
Runtime decisions MUST include policy version and hash.
Policy activation MUST be atomic to prevent mixed-version decisions.
Policy publication without `owner` approval MUST be rejected.
Rollback operations MUST target immutable snapshots only.
Every active agent MUST have a unique immutable agent_id.
Rule IDs MUST be unique within the machine-readable registry.
Any rule ID reference in governed artifacts MUST resolve in the registry.
Registry and coverage artifacts MUST be regenerated on rule updates.
Integrity validation MUST fail on broken path references or unresolved rule IDs.
No action executes without `policy_engine` decision.
Every execution unit MUST carry `trace_id` and policy metadata.
Budget reservation MUST complete before dispatch for costed actions.
Governance enforcement actions MUST NOT be bypassed by runtime components.
Obligations from `allow_with_obligations` decisions MUST be executed before dispatch.
Runtime event emission MUST be append-only and immutable for governance-critical actions.
Safety containment actions take priority over normal execution.
Safety enforcement MUST remain independent from operational execution.
Safety incidents MUST be recorded in immutable execution logs.
owner override capability MUST remain available and auditable.
Agent pause events MUST notify ceo and escalate to owner when critical impact is detected.
Sandbox MUST enforce per-task resource quotas.
Forbidden capabilities MUST fail closed.
Profile selection MUST be authorized by policy obligations before execution.
Sandbox failures MUST produce immutable containment telemetry.
Secrets MUST NOT be persisted in logs or task outputs by default.
Every schema MUST carry explicit schema_version.
Execution logs MUST be append-only and checksum-verifiable.
Project and agent states MUST map to canonical state dimensions.
Runtime events and persistent records MUST be correlated via trace_id.
Source-of-truth relational data and derived memory indexes MUST maintain consistency guarantees.
Audit data MUST be immutable and retained per policy.
Snapshot artifacts MUST exist before compression or archival compaction.
Retention transitions MUST preserve traceability metadata.
Destructive deletion overrides MUST require owner approval.
Storage access MUST enforce project isolation boundaries.
Critical rules MUST have at least one conformance mapping in coverage artifacts.
Spec integrity checks MUST pass before merge/release.
State machine specs MUST be consistent with orchestration/runtime contracts.
Constitution/spec role and authority mappings MUST remain consistent.
Tool investigation RFCs MUST record adopt/defer decisions before architecture baseline lock.
Tool execution MUST be authorized by Policy Engine before invocation.
Every task execution path MUST preserve trace context.
